title: OPERATION SAUCER #9 [Operação Prato]  reports n.081 to n.090 [1978]
excerpt: 01. REG. n. 081 02. PLACE: Baia do Sol – Mosqueiro-PA 03. DATE / TIME: 22 Dec 77 – at 03:20 hours 04. DESCRIPTION: Luminous body 05. COLOR: Reddish yellow 06. FORM: Undefined 07. APPARENT SIZE: 5 cm 08. MOVEMENT straight path, Southeast / Northwest 09. SPEED: Average (-500km / h) 10. ALTITUDE: 1,500 m […]
text_preview:
- 01. REG. n. 081

- 02. PLACE: Baia do Sol – Mosqueiro-PA

- 03. DATE / TIME: 22 Dec 77 – at 03:20 hours

- 04. DESCRIPTION: Luminous body

- 05. COLOR: Reddish yellow

- 06. FORM: Undefined

- 07. APPARENT SIZE: 5 cm

- 08. MOVEMENT straight path, Southeast / Northwest

- 09. SPEED: Average (-500km / h)

- 10. ALTITUDE: 1,500 m (estimated)

- 11. DISTANCE: 1,000 m (estimated)

- 12. OBSERVER (S): 1S C AT MT FLÁVIO and Civilians UBIRATAN PINON and Mrs. F.M. FREITAS and SRA. CELIA MONTENEGRO

- 13. NOTE: The UFO started to emit bluish flashes when quite far (8,000m) from the observation point.
summary: Operação Prato reports 081–090: ten sightings Dec 1977–Feb 1978 in Pará; report 083 describes a hat-shaped craft landed on ground for 10 min; report 087 shows object with circular body hovering over beach directing blue beam.
